channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping and overflowing bins, 28th April
item.description:
Bins are overflowing and there is excess rubbish and fly tipping all over the road. It is a health hazard.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wimbourne Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: End of Kingsley road, 28th April
item.description:
Fly tipping again. Council please do something about it!!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsley Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Three black bags thrown into hedge by a railway line, 28th April
item.description:
Only been dumped there recently

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2-22, Wotton Green, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive rubbish, 28th April
item.description:
The corner of the block 33-51 is always overfilling with rubbish and objects that should not be disposed of there (a tv, now?). There are 2 big bings available, why not leaving both outside? Rubbish was collected yesterday and all that was left behind. It happens literally every week and it's disgusting
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Llanover Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Building waste on pavement, 28th April
item.description:
Building waste left on pavement by 32 Roydene Road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Roydene Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 28th April
item.description:
Tyres placed on pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Perry Street, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped bales of rubbish in sealed black plastic bags, 28th April
item.description:
Contents could be hazardous?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1A, Littlejohn Road, Ramsden, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of dog poo abandoned by overflowing bin, 28th April
item.description:
This is a health hazard

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Recreation Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped all the way down Heathland Road N16, 28th April
item.description:
Rubbish dumped in Heathland Road N16. Hat stand outside 9 Heathland Road. Radiator outside 7 Heathland Road. Fridge freezer by number 1.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Heathland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 28th April
item.description:
Sofa on pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ankerdine Crescent, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox in road, 28th April
item.description:
Dead fox in road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Colyers Lane, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped fridge, 28th April
item.description:
Constant fly tipping in this location most mornings. On the corner of Astbury Road by the tree on the right hand side.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Regal Row, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish all over pavements, 28th April
item.description:
Rubbish left all over pavements outside 14 onwards. Likely left over from bin collection
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Newick Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping bins area next to Barbrook house, 28th April
item.description:
There is a sofa, a big chest of drawers, multiple filled cardboard boxes and bin bags just scattered around the bins area. The sofa has been here since Friday, the rest was added over the weekend.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Paragon Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Double Yellow Lines, 28th April
item.description:
As you can see , there is an odd gap in the new double yellow lines at this point. There aren't supposed to be any parking bays here anymore, so I know it isn't that.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albemarle Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip on the green, 28th April
item.description:
Someone has throw rubbish on the green opposite the disabled bay parking
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Petersham Drive, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Toilet left by communal bins, 28th April
item.description:
Toilet left by communal bins of flats

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Albion Drive, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree requires a bit of pruning to make pathway accessible, 28th April
item.description:
There are about 3 trees outside 29 Anerley Park that require a bit of pruning so the pathway is accessible please. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Park, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped fence, 28th April
item.description:
Fencing, flooring, building materials and general waste dumped opposite 191 Ravensbourne Avenue Spilling onto pavement.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ravensbourne Avenue, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light outside 21 Great Spilmans once again not working, 28th April
item.description:
The light was repaired 6 months ago but has stopped working again.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Great Spilmans, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
